project: Tag time entries and filter the time-entry list by tag — feature-add extending the frozen freelancer time-tracking baseline (v1).

baseline_completed_slices.name: Sign in via OAuth on the web application
Log and persist billable time entries against a project
Export a monthly PDF invoice with line items and monetary totals
Create and manage client projects with currency and billable rate

slices.name: Tag a time entry with a label
slices.value_basis: Core of new feature: R11 sets label, R13 persists it — travel together (set means nothing unless stored). Filtering (S6) has no value until entries carry tags.
slices.retires_risk: Tag persistence by EXTENDING contract CT2 (A14): first exercise of additive label field on existing time-entry record at the C1 seam; proves extend-existing-contract approach before filtering depends on stored tags.

slices.name: Filter the time-entry list by tag
slices.value_basis: Reads labels set by S5; secondary to tagging — useful once entries carry tags, peripheral to core log/persist path.
